Mods.Name: Enhanced Vanilla
Mods.Author: Nicull
Mods.Description:
Adds every single mod that enhances the vanilla experience, it does not include Rundens A.I or the RHD cars (since they dont make much sense in the game)

The best way to play the game!

-Adds diesel engines and a new V8
-New cars
-New rims
-Physics lock for all cars
-tire wear
-turbo
-plate edit
-Spoilers for lada and golf
-Fuel, temperature and RPM gauges
-Caddy towhitch
-Physical ignition switch for all cars
-Breakable crates
-Fuel consumption mod
-Realistic Handbrake
-Mount anywhere
-Automatic transmissions
-And the gutted ikarus mod 

1.2 Changelog:
-Removed Serenas physlock mod since it caused a few issues
-Updated all mods

Known bugs:
Tire wear mod causes your starting car to not have any grip. Just save and load when you start a new game to fix this.

-Use manual only, main menu automatic transmission/clutch break one of the mods

Mods.Name: One of the best Modpacks (hopefully)
Mods.Author: Mazda Astina GT
Mods.Description:
version 1.5 changelog:
-Updated all mods on latest version
-added one mod (trabant/beetle radiator mod)

This is my modpack that contains 23 mods, if you want to know which mods exactly, ask me or download the modpack and find out yourself!

Fun fact:
The Vaz2107 on the picture is is my 'Lada 400+'... it drives max about 450 km/h without hyperzine or other cheats, just Large Twin Turbo 7.0L V8.

And thanks to Kolben for adding it on the workshop!

Made by Mazda Astina GT#6224 on discord, if you found anything about my modpack or if you have any questions dm me.

version 1.5 changelog:

-Updated all mods on latest version
-changed description
-added few mods and removed few, i kinda changed my opinion on few mods
-Changed picture because i already removed 2104 mod, my sedan ladas kept on turning into wagon ones...

Fun fact:
The Vaz2107 on the picture is is my 'Lada 400+'... it drives max about 450 km/h without hyperzine or other cheats, just Large Twin Turbo 7.0L V8.

And thanks to Kolben for adding it on the workshop!
Made by Mazda Astina GT#6224 on discord, if you have any questions about my modpack or me, dm me.

Mods.Name: Encolumned's Simplicity
Mods.Author: Encolumned
Mods.Description:
Bare bones car mods for enhancing what types of cars you can find. No items added, just QoL mods and Car Mods, such as:
 
2104 and 2107 Lada Riva Estate by RUNDEN
RHD Mod by RUNDEN 
Automatic Transmissions by RUNDEN 
Caddyhitch by Serena
Irakus Phys. Lock [NOT GUTTED] by Serena
Physlock for all Cars by Serena

If you have any issues with the modpack, please contact me on the discord through DMs, then I will try to contact the respective people depending on the issue.

Mods.Name: Hardcore Modpack
Mods.Author: Maspunch
Mods.Description:
A bunch of mods which make the game slightly harder and more interesting if you want some challenge 
 
Serenas Rims 
Rundens Tire Damage
Rundens Automatic Autotragic 
Rundens RHD 
Rundens Lada Spoilers 
Rundens Disable Loot Spawn 
Runden Breakable Rocks 
Rundens AI 
Rundens 2104 
Rundens 2107 Estate 
Ghaleas Diesel Cars 
Coolgamers Exploding Cacti

Mods.Name: TumpyNoodles Exquisite Extentions
Mods.Author: Tumpy_Noodles
Mods.Description:
Quantity & Quality with an 'All Thrill. No Fill.' Money Back Guarantee

Every mod that meets my standard of quality that isn't devicive so everyone should be able to enjoy.

Includes:

Every Mod Car, Engine (except electric), and Gauge, and includes Badges, Posters, Rims, Turbos, & Automatics.
'quality-of-life' such as 
PhyslockRad, Caddy&Beetle Hitch, LadaSpoilers, FastPedal, PushHarder, IronSights, BetterCrates, MountAnywhere, & IgnitionBarrels.
'utillities' like 
CarInfotainmentText, SpawnerESC, WheelPosEditor, SaveFileClearOut, BackgroundAutoSave, DopplerRemover, & SnaptoAxis.

Controls:
ENTER -- Cruise Control
Hold SHIFT -- SnaptoAxis
F2 -- Car Infotainment
CTRL + ALT + F10 -- SaveFileClearOut
ESC (with 1000km driven) -- Spawner
Scroll Lock -- WheelPosEditor
